EmailTemplate.description: Email to be used when renewals team want to provide an offer.
EmailTemplate.name: Renewals Offer
EmailTemplate.subject: Renew your policy and get rewarded
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Still interested in a Kingsbridge insurance policy?
Renew within the next 7 days and we'll send you £40 in online vouchers.
Call 01242 808740 to purchase over the phone. Alternatively, buy your business insurance policy online - https://www.kingsbridge.co.uk/buy?journey=1
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
Offer Terms and Conditions: 1. This offer is valid only to Kingsbridge customers who renew a Professional Indemnity or Public Liability package and excludes the purchase of Legal Expenses and IR35 Protect policies purchased on their own. 2. The policy must be purchased within 7 days of the offer being communicated by Kingsbridge. 3. This offer cannot be used in conjunction with any other Kingsbridge voucher offer. 4. Online vouchers will be sent 28 days after the policy start date and a 6-month validity period will apply. Vouchers may take between 7-10 days to reach customers. Online vouchers can be redeemed for a gift card of the customer’s choice at Voucher Express from a range of Vendors. Full range for the VEX Multi-Choice voucher can be viewed by visiting https://www.voucherexpress.co.uk/full-range.aspx 5. Rewards are subject to availability.
